global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a focus on a product display and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a new collection sale with a discount.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: A minimalist representation of two product items with a light purple hue, positioned centrally.

elements.description: A circular icon in the bottom left corner, possibly indicating a feature or detail related to the product.

elements.label: New collection drop
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'New collection drop' with a modern font, centrally positioned.

elements.label: ThreadMark SALE

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A prominent white button with the text 'Order now' in bold, located at the bottom center.

elements.label: 30% discount badge
elements.description: A small, bold text indicating '30%' in white, positioned at the bottom left.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label with the text 'UGC' in white, located at the top left corner.
